0.2.0.title: Autonomous Operations & Self-Healing Infrastructure
notes: feat: zero-inference keyword classifier with route hints replaces LLM-based secretary
feat: adaptive performance tiers — context windows and sampling scale with task complexity
feat: user dissatisfaction detection with automatic escalation to higher reasoning tiers
feat: artist/cinematographer feedback-first workflow — creative plan before generation
feat: runtime model management — pull, remove, search, install across all backends
feat: service self-healing — start/restart backends via IPC without manual intervention
feat: preferences system with per-group defaults and per-user overrides
feat: voice transcription with multi-language auto-translation subscriptions
feat: per-user engagement tracking in group chats with disengage protocol
feat: performance metrics logging with version-over-version comparison
feat: event-driven IPC via fs.watch replaces 100ms polling
feat: source bind-mount — code changes apply without container rebuild
feat: post-build image verification with automatic buildkit cache recovery
feat: container version gating — stale containers exit on startup
feat: stuck-loop detection replaces hard tool-round cap (local = no cost limits)
fix: SearXNG preserved across builds — only nanoclaw containers killed
fix: web_search returns clear 'do not retry' on backend failure
fix: mid-task replies use coordinator, not disabled secretary
fix: all backend catch blocks log errors — no silent failures
test: 468 tests covering routing, classification, escalation, tools, and preferences

0.1.0.title: Intelligent Routing & Creative Pipeline
notes: feat: semantic message classification via qwen3:4b secretary with coordinator review
feat: self-improving routing — coordinator grades decisions, corrections feed back into classifier
feat: 4-tier escalation ladder with auto-escalation on model failure detection
feat: web search via local SearXNG metasearch (privacy-first, no external tracking)
feat: task scheduling — once, interval, and cron expressions via IPC
feat: proactive memory — updates personal notes on corrections and preferences
feat: image generation — FLUX via ComfyUI and OllamaDiffuser with auto-backend selection
feat: video generation — LTX-Video and HunyuanVideo with I2V support
feat: artist and cinematographer creative directors powered by qwen2.5vl:72b
feat: mid-task chat — respond to users while processing long-running tasks
feat: background history compression — runs between turns, not during inference
feat: voice transcription via local faster-whisper (no API key required)
feat: Telegram integration with bot pool, typing indicators, and thinking status
perf: adaptive context windows — 8k to 64k based on model and task complexity
perf: specialist models evict immediately after use — coordinator stays pinned

0.0.1.title: Initial Setup
notes: feat: NanoClaw fork with Telegram channel integration
feat: ollama runner container for local model inference on Apple Silicon
feat: Jarvis bot registration with per-group container isolation
feat: Docker-based sandboxing with credential proxy
